name: Maple Ridge Water Treatment Plant
description: Municipal water treatment facility processing 50 MGD. Controls include chlorination dosing, filtration, pump stations, and reservoir level management via SCADA + PLCs over Modbus.

regulatory.name: EPA AWIA 2018
regulatory.scope: America's Water Infrastructure Act — risk + resilience assessments + emergency response plans

regulatory.name: WaterISAC Baseline
regulatory.scope: 15 fundamental cybersecurity practices for the water sector

risks.name: Modbus FC5/6 unauthenticated writes
risks.note: Anyone on the lab segment can change setpoints

risks.name: Cleartext OpenPLC web password
risks.note: stored as cleartext in openplc.db (legacy /login compares strings)

risks.name: Pump station MITM — replay attack on RTU

steps.title: Watch the wire
steps.body: Open the Live Modbus Wire Feed below. You'll see steady FC2/FC3 polls between softplc-1 and softplc-2 — that's the master polling sensor-sim every 100 ms.

steps.title: Inject a write
steps.body: In the Modbus Write Playground, set Target=sensor-sim, Kind=register, Addr=1, Value=850 (forces water temp to 85 °F). Click Send.

steps.title: See the write on wire
steps.body: An FC6 frame appears in the wire feed colored amber — that's your write. Wireshark would show this exact same packet.

steps.title: Watch the synoptic
steps.body: The thermometer climbs to 85 °F. HI_TEMP_ALARM activates. Synoptic title bar gets the WRITES OVERRIDE badge.

steps.title: Forensics
steps.body: Click Capture softplc-2 to take a 60 s pcap. Open in Wireshark and hunt the FC6 frame — that's the indicator-of-compromise.

steps.title: Restore
steps.body: Click Clear sensor-sim overrides. Tank/temp/press waveforms resume. Lab is ready for the next exercise.

steps.title: Note the link state
steps.body: softplc-1's mirror shows link_ok=1 and link_loss=0. The synoptic LINK indicator is green.

steps.title: Inject heartbeat freeze
steps.body: Click Pause heartbeat in the Inject Fault panel. Sensor-sim keeps producing waveform data, but the heartbeat counter freezes.

steps.title: Watch the watchdog
steps.body: Wait ~3 seconds. softplc-1's ST program detects 30 unchanged scans — link_ok flips to 0, link_loss increments. Synoptic LINK indicator turns red.

steps.title: Recover
steps.body: Click Clear all faults. Heartbeat resumes. link_ok returns to 1. link_loss stays at its incremented value as the persistent record.

walkthroughs.name: Hunt attackers in the honeypot fabric

steps.title: Survey the personas
steps.body: Three Conpot personas are running on honeypot-host (10.20.30.50/.51/.52). Each emulates a different vendor PLC — Siemens, Schneider, Rockwell.

steps.title: Probe a persona
steps.body: From a different machine on the lab segment, run: nmap -sV 10.20.30.51. The Schneider persona answers with vendor banners.

steps.title: Watch the intel panel
steps.body: Within 8 seconds, the Schneider card's connection counters tick up. Your IP appears in the top-attackers list — Conpot logged you.

steps.title: Capture the attack
steps.body: Click Capture honeypot-host. The pcap will show your scan packets in full forensic detail — usable as a lab teaching artifact.
